solution:
def canBeTypedWords(self, text: str, brokenLetters: str) -> int:
    count = 0
    for word in text.split():
        if set(word).issubset(brokenLetters):
            count += 1
    return count

efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW

Explanation:
We iterate through each word in the text and check if it is a subset of the brokenLetters set. If a word is a subset, we increment the count. The solution has a linear time complexity (O(n)) and constant space complexity (O(1)). The energy implications are low as the solution only requires a small amount of energy for processing.
